title: The Aquamazong Special
description: A client-side modpack that adds optimization, visual, audio, and QoL improvements.
body:
# Overview
This is my take on the typical 'Optifine replacement' modpack while also adding what I consider to be must-have utility, QoL, and visual/audio improvements. All client-side so you can play on multiplayer servers.

### Performance
You'll find a lot of the most popular optimization mods here, the main one being Sodium. All together, it should run as good as or better than Optifine.

### Optifine Parity
There are mods to replace pretty much all of Optifine's features.

### Utility/QoL
There are a number of utility/quality-of-life mods, including zooming, freecam, a minimap and worldmap, command macros, and more.

### Visual/Audio
This modpack includes shaders, 3D skin layers, new ambient noises, new footstep sounds, falling leaves, popping bubbles, dynamic lights, eating animations, and more.

*-Aquamazong*
